scenarios.description: Reader overload propagates IllegalArgumentException from treeBuilder.parse
scenarios.precondition: Parser with TreeBuilder whose parse() throws IllegalArgumentException
scenarios.expectedResult: IllegalArgumentException is thrown with original message
pseudocode: @Override public ParseSettings defaultSettings() { return new HtmlTreeBuilder().defaultSettings(); }
@Override public Document parse(Reader in, String baseUri, Parser parser) { throw new IllegalArgumentException("bad arg"); }
@Override public List<Node> parseFragment(Reader in, Element context, String baseUri, Parser parser) { return null; }

scenarios.description: Reader overload returns null when treeBuilder.parse returns null Document
scenarios.precondition: Parser with TreeBuilder whose parse() returns null
pseudocode: @Override public ParseSettings defaultSettings() { return new HtmlTreeBuilder().defaultSettings(); }
@Override public Document parse(Reader in, String baseUri, Parser parser) { return null; }
@Override public List<Node> parseFragment(Reader in, Element context, String baseUri, Parser parser) { return null; }

scenarios.description: String overload propagates IOException thrown when reading from Reader via reflection
scenarios.precondition: Parser with TreeBuilder reading from faulty Reader that throws IOException on read
scenarios.expectedResult: IOException is thrown with cause message from Reader
pseudocode: @Override public ParseSettings defaultSettings() { return new HtmlTreeBuilder().defaultSettings(); }
@Override public Document parse(Reader in, String baseUri, Parser parser) throws IOException {
@Override public List<Node> parseFragment(Reader in, Element context, String baseUri, Parser parser) { return null; }
// Use reflection to invoke Reader overload
@Override public int read(char[] cbuf, int off, int len) throws IOException { throw new IOException("read failed"); }
invoke m on p with faulty, "uri";
throws IOException with cause message "read failed";
